name: x940-wasm
description: MT940 bank statement parser for browser, Deno, Bun, and Node.js — compiled to WebAssembly

scripts.build: npm run build:bundler && npm run build:node && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run build:node && node tests/test_parse.js && node tests/test_export.js && node tests/test_edge_cases.js && node tests/test_auto_detect.js
